summary: The diff correctly implements REQ-1 in FinalProposalSection.tsx. The YES button now calls handleYes() which opens the WhatsApp deep link (https://wa.me/918810471387?text=I%20said%20YES%20%E2%9D%A4%EF%B8%8F) in a new tab. The celebration overlay state and rendering have been removed. The THINK AGAIN button retains its cursor-dodging behavior. No other components are modified.
